# Lead Clash
> B2B outbound marketing agency specializing in LinkedIn optimization, lead generation, and virtual assistance. Founded in 2021, proudly delivering world-class services from Sri Lanka.

## Services

### LinkedIn Profile Optimization - $70 per profile
Complete LinkedIn profile makeover including headline, summary, experience, skills, recommendations, custom banner design, keyword optimization, and profile review with improvement suggestions.

### LinkedIn Lead Generation - $10 per hour
Targeted B2B prospect list building with verified contacts. Includes lead data collection (name, email, job title, industry, company), lead filtering by industry, job title, and location, and LinkedIn outreach strategy development.

### Graphic Design & Video Editing - $10 per hour
Personalized video editing for outreach campaigns, long-form and short-form video editing, social media and carousel post design, and brand-aligned creative assets.

### Virtual Assistance & Outreach Support - $10 per hour
LinkedIn and cold email campaign management, calendar and CRM management, data entry and database management, and general virtual assistant tasks.

## Target Industries
- SaaS & Tech Companies
- Consulting & Professional Services
- Recruitment & HR Services
- Finance & Investment Firms
- Marketing & Creative Agencies

## Team
- Yasiru Dasanayaka - Founder (7+ years in digital marketing)
- Bihesha Dissanayake - Virtual Assistant
- Pamith Senuja - Virtual Assistant
- Malshan Irosh - Graphic Designer
- Yohan Dissanayaka - Video Editor
